title: Your public library can get you almost any book on earth for $5 or less
author: Ellsworth Toohey
summary:
You need a $198 academic text or research? Or am out-of-print monograph that doesn't show up on any used-book site? Brian Schrader, a San Diego blogger, ran into both problems constantly until he discovered a system called Inter-Library Loan.

ILL lets your local library request a physical book from basically any other library in the country — or the world. —
